1:
You are accosted by a restless Milalla, who begs your assistance in rescuing defenseless animals from the Matchlock Menagerie's hungry scorpions. Before you can ask any further questions, however, the Milalla darts off towards the menagerie, assuming you will not be far behind.

※Please note that the difficulty of this quest has been synced to your current level.

48: You! Yes, you! With the weapon! Pardon my candor, but you must accompany me to the Matchlock Menagerie <Emphasis>this instant</Emphasis>!

59: In my previous life, I was tasked with introducing new and exciting creatures into the Matchlock Menagerie, that our guests might know the wonders of the animal kingdom.
